introSection: New York Getaway (Japanese: ニューヨーク・ゲッタウエイ) is a steel roller coaster formerly located at Neo Geo World Tokyo Bayside in Odaiba, Minato, Tokyo, Japan. The coaster was made to simulate a New York style car chase.
fullText: New York Getaway (Japanese: ニューヨーク・ゲッタウエイ) is a steel roller coaster formerly located at Neo Geo World Tokyo Bayside in Odaiba, Minato, Tokyo, Japan. The coaster was made to simulate a New York style car chase.
